name: Paymob
description: Paymob — Egypt and MENA payment gateway supporting cards, mobile wallets, Meeza, ValU, and installments with POS hardware.

seo.title: Paymob — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Paymob: Paymob — Egypt and MENA payment gateway supporting cards, mobile wallets, Meeza, ValU, and installments with POS hardware.

when_to_use: Accepting Meeza and mobile wallets for Egyptian merchants
Installment payment integration (ValU BNPL) for MENA e-commerce
POS hardware deployment for Egyptian retail businesses
Card acceptance with 3DS for Egypt and GCC online checkout

pros: Broad MENA coverage incl. Egypt and GCC
review.verdict: Leading MENA gateway with genuine local-method depth, but expect rough edges in DX and onboarding.
review.best_for: Merchants expanding across Egypt, UAE, and Saudi Arabia needing local methods
review.not_for: Teams needing consistent developer experience across regions
